race.comment: Open race to close out the card. DIALIDAE (1) has been right there in all three runs this preparation and looks to be working up to another victory. Gets some well-needed weight relief with the 3kg claim and should be right there when the whips are cracking. REMEMBER THE BOYS (6) broke the maiden status here at the latest outing and will have taken some confidence from that breakthrough win. Can go back-to-back without surprising. KAYLEEN'S PROFIT (8) was a touch disappointing last time out but the form prior was good enough for a race of this calibre. Worth another chance. NEXT LEGACY (3) didn't measure up in a much richer race here last start but had been racing well prior. In the mix on best figures. KING OF THE VIBE (10) best of the rest from the inside alley.
